programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Expressive texts: Writing a postcard'. We do revision on expressive texts with a focus on writing a postcard.

programme.title: Grade 3 Literacy
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Bk1: Homophones'. We revise homophones (Repeat).

programme.title: Incremental Introduction of...
programme.desc: 'Incremental Introduction of African Languages (IIAL). E20 - IsiXhosa'. This program aims to offer children a chance to learn the African languages of IsiXhosa and IsiZulu, in a fun and interactive way.

programme.title: Grade 4 Literacy
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Think of interesting descriptions (adjectives)'. We do revision on adjectives (Repeat). To get lesson notes on this episode send a whatsapp to +27 60 070 3308 with the code G4T3W2E2.

programme.title: Grade 5 Literacy Repeat
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Tell them what to do'. We will learn about adjectives. (Repeat). To get lesson notes on this episode send a whatsapp to +27 60 070 3308 with the code G4T3W2E2.

programme.title: Grade 6 Literacy Repeat
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Revision Bk1: To be' or not 'to be': verbs'. We learn about verbs.

programme.title: Grade 7 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S3 - Mathematical Language'. We look at using mathematical language.

programme.title: Grade 7 Natural Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E17 - Potential and kinetic energy: The Law of Conservation of Energy'. We learn about potential and kinetic energy, mainly the Law of Conservation of Energy.

programme.title: Big School
programme.desc: 'S1/E26'. A collection of locally produced animation aimed at preschool level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Say What Quiz
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Debate'. Tertiary institutions go head to head in an annual SAYWHAT Debate tournament based on youth health related issues.

programme.title: Mathematics Teacher Talk
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Geometry of Parallel Lines'. We talk about triangles, different types of triangles and pythagoras. We talk about how visual proofs can be used to effectively teach some triangle proofs in Grade 8 and 9.

programme.title: Great Lesson Ideas
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Great lesson Ideas'. In this foundation phase module we showcase a technique for improving the speed of your lessons using a timer and planning timing for each part of the lesson.

programme.title: Ten Fold Live
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Geography'. In this TenFold live show repeat we answer learners questions sent in by learners.

programme.desc: 'S1 - Life Science'. Grade 12 TenFold show live from Randburg studio with Cathy Hasty bringing you Life Science.

programme.title: Siyaya, Come Wild With Us
programme.desc: 'S2 - Gamkaberg - Mountain Fortress'. Four youngsters explore the seldom visited Gamkaberg Mountains in search of a magnificent creature that almost disappeared.

programme.title: Siyaya, Come Wild With Us
programme.desc: 'S2 - Cederberg - The Secret Library'. Four youngsters embark on a search for a secret library that is hidden in a remote mountain range where an ancient civilisation existed for thousands of years.

programme.title: Grade 10 Physical Science

programme.title: Grade 11 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Electostatics and Coulomb's Law (Coulomb's Law)'. In this lesson, we will focus on electric charges, Coulomb's law, superposition of 1D forces and superposition of 2D forces.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 of 21 - Boob-Watch'. Nicole Eggert wants smaller breasts after her last surgeon gave her huge implants. Dr Dubrow tries to reconstruct a woman with a flesh-eating disease.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 of 21 - The Bacon Bra'. The doctors help a female bodybuilder who wants to look more feminine. Paul performs surgery on a woman who has large-nostril anxiety.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 of 21 - Four Leeches And A Funeral'. Reality star Dwight Eubanks says farewell to his nose with a funeral. A woman's breast surgery has left her with a suspicious bubble on her breast.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 of 21 - Mo' Steroids Mo' Problems'. Terry helps Mo Thugs rapper Guillermo 'Big Caz' Eiland and his case of male breasts. A UK man with super-sized lips sees the doctors.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: 'S9/E7 of 21 - The Courage To Change'. Khloé must make a choice about her relationship with Lamar, Kourtney takes Scott on a getaway to a spa in Arizona and Rob receives troubling news.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: 'S9/E8 of 21 - Let It Go'. The family tries to get to the bottom of Kourtney's perceived lack of emotions. Meanwhile, Khloe accepts an offer on her house, but doesn't want to start packing.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 of 21 - Colour Me Lonely'. Kris goes overboard trying to make sure Bruce isn't getting lonely now that they are separated. Scott and Kourtney inherit a painting that might be worth millions.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 of 12 - Double Trouble'. Kourtney and Khloé deal with the heart-breaking reality that both of their relationships have come to an end.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 of 21 - The Living Doll'. Dr Dubrow operates on a transgender woman's uni-boob, Dr Nassif fixes a crater on a nose and the doctors meet Blondie, who wants to be a plastic doll.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 of 21 - Stitched Up Sisters'. Dr Dubrow performs full body work on two co-dependent sisters, Dr Nassif operates on a large man with a large nose and the doctors meet Penny Brown.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 of 17 - Foreign Bodies'. The doctors attempt to fix Rajee's cement-filled face, while an 'out of this world' patient wants to look like an alien.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: 'S8/E9 of 16 - Ciao For Now'. The crew's day off at a beach resort is filled with tension and division lingering from the previous night's conflicts.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: 'S8/E10 of 16 - Dirty Laundry'. A new deckhand's skills are doubted. The captain tries convincing a deckhand to stay. The crew faces a hard docking in Portofino.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Potomac
programme.desc: 'S5/E15 of 22 - Portu-Girl-Bye'. The women head to Madeira, Portugal, for some fun and sun, but seem to have difficulty remembering that Portugal is a country.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Potomac
programme.desc: 'S5/E16 of 22 - Picking Sides'. Karen surprises the group with very personal details about her marriage. Candiace reveals that she's thinking about trying to get pregnant.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Potomac
programme.desc: 'S5/E17 of 22 - Fifty Shades Of Betrayal'. Ashley and Gizelle host a dominatrix party filled with whips, sex toys and leather, and everyone enjoys dressing up, but the fun is quickly halted.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Potomac
programme.desc: 'S5/E18 of 22'. Gizelle plans a family photo shoot as one of her daughters turns 15, but Jamal doesn't show up. Karen gets intimate with Ray in a bubble bath.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Potomac

programme.desc: Rappers Method Man and Redman drive this wacky classic comedy about two stoners. They smoke a magical herb that helps them gain acceptance to Harvard University.

programme.title: Blood Rush AKA Flipped
programme.desc: A famous model, trapped inside an upside-down car, reaches a mysterious man on her damaged cell phone. However, roadside assistance is the last thing on the stranger's mind.

programme.title: Falklands Heroes
programme.desc: A war film recounting the Falkland's War between the UK and Argentina. Based in the 1980's.

programme.title: Amazing Love
programme.desc: Teen friends, Steve, Carrie, Cooper, and Gameboy embark on a weekend camping trip lead by their church youth group leader Stuart (Sean Astin) and his wife Beth.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: A couple's break-up proceeds to get uglier and nastier by the moment as each tries to keep their luxurious condo from the other.

programme.title: Jamie Foxx: Secret To Success
programme.desc: A comprehensive look at the life and career of veteran actor Jamie Foxx. From starting out in comedy to Oscar wins and nominations, Foxx's career has been nothing short of success.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette and her best friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on an exciting and thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective

programme.title: Skyscraper

programme.title: Kevin Hart

programme.title: Ride Along 2

programme.title: Battleship

programme.title: The Mummy

programme.title: Echelon Conspiracy
programme.desc: When Max Peterson receives a series of mysterious cell phone messages that promise him untold wealth, he soon finds himself the victim of a deadly international plot.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: They say that opposites attract, at least for one intoxicated evening, but several pregnancy tests later, Ben and Alison are lead on a funny and heart-warming journey in parenthood.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Kalahari'. Exploring the incredible Kalahari desert, where there's no rainfall at all and the animals must go to incredible lengths to survive.

programme.title: Exploring India with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The South'. Bettany enjoys the breath-taking journey through the Tamil Nadu hills, between Mettupalayam and Udhagamandalam (Ooty).

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Philippines'. Martin explores the Philippines, from Manila's jeepneys to remote tribal burials.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E7 - New Horizons'. Sue collects firewood. Ricko and his son Skyler go beaver trapping. Jessie explores his newly purchased land. The Hailstones move up river.

programme.title: Wonders of the Moon with Dara Ó Briain
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Dara tells the story of how the first photograph of the far side of the moon left scientists baffled. And he tries a virtual reality headset to takes his very own giant leap on the 'moon's' surface.

programme.title: Levison Wood: Walking With...
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Orangutans'. BBC Earth inspires audiences by sharing the incredible wonders of our universe. The channel showcases the work of the world’s foremost factual film makers.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Kalahari'. Exploring the incredible Kalahari desert, where there's no rainfall at all and the animals must go to incredible lengths to survive.

programme.title: Exploring India with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The South'. Bettany enjoys the breath-taking journey through the Tamil Nadu hills, between Mettupalayam and Udhagamandalam (Ooty).

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Super Senses'. Steve goes in search of Deadly Predators with the greatest super-senses.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E6 - Oxfordshire'. Ben is closer to home than he's ever been in rural Oxfordshire where he spends the week with a multi-generational family, who surrendered their conventional life.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Alice ends her adventure in Aswan, whose quarries provided the granite for the country's vast collection of Ancient Egyptian monuments. She then takes a boat to see the extraordinary Philae Temple.

programme.title: Levison Wood: Walking With...
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Orangutans'. BBC Earth inspires audiences by sharing the incredible wonders of our universe. The channel showcases the work of the world’s foremost factual film makers.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Steve returns home to the Atlantic waters of the British Isles as he considers the question of what humanity can do to ensure the enduring future of whales, which have already survived so much.

programme.title: Nature's Great Migrations
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Elephants'. A thousand elephants including vulnerable orphans come together in a crucial annual gathering in northern Kenya where they face deadly threats from predators and poachers.

programme.title: Nature's Great Migrations
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Caribou'. A hundred thousand caribou face starving bears, wolves, deadly frozen rivers and rugged mountains as they undertake the world's longest land migration.

programme.title: Nature's Great Migrations
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Zebra'. Thousands of zebra face lions, hunting dogs, drought and starvation as they undertake a gruelling migration across Botswana's brutal wilderness.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Railways and Royalty'. Michael examines 180 years of royal fascination with the railways, going all the way back to King George V and Queen Mary's Royal Train Tour in 1913.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E4 - Crete: Chania, Knossos and Eleutherna'. Arriving just as a sea storm hits, Bettany is lucky to reach Crete. She travels to the ruins of the ancient city of Knossos.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E5 - The Peloponnese: Sparta, Mycenae and Pylos'. Bettany arrives in the Peloponnese, home to some of ancient Greece's most legendary kings and vicious warriors.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Tony Robinson leaps into the future to explore artificial intelligence. From a humanoid robot that answers back, to the little workhorses that make next-day delivery possible.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Kalahari'. Exploring the incredible Kalahari desert, where there's no rainfall at all and the animals must go to incredible lengths to survive.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Mattresses'. Gregg Wallace is in Leeds at an enormous mattress factory that produces 600 bouncy beds every day.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E10 - Northumberland'. Ben travels to Northumberland where he meets Kezz and Nathalie Petronelli-Stone. Their off-grid and environmentally sensitive approach to life means they don't even have a telly.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 - Ahead of the Game'. Sue travels home to Kavik. Andy and Denise return to Eagle. Jessie prepares for the Iditarod. The Hailstones do chores in Kiwalik.

programme.title: Hidden Frontiers: Arabia...
programme.desc: 'Hidden Frontiers: Arabia with Reza Pakravan. S1/E1'. Reza explores the possibility of human habitation in an impenetrable canyon system in Oman.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Kalahari'. Exploring the incredible Kalahari desert, where there's no rainfall at all and the animals must go to incredible lengths to survive.

programme.title: Treasures with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Oman'. Bettany uncovers a society which grew rich by selling copper, and visits the crowning glory of Bronze Age Oman.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E10 - Northumberland'. Ben travels to Northumberland where he meets Kezz and Nathalie Petronelli-Stone. Their off-grid and environmentally sensitive approach to life means they don't even have a telly.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Mattresses'. Gregg Wallace is in Leeds at an enormous mattress factory that produces 600 bouncy beds every day.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - Do-nut Ride This Carousel'. The bakers make bloody filled doughnuts to commemorate an unfortunate accident and mix joy with doom on the creepiest carousel ever.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Alex Vs Iron Chefs'. In a battle for the ages, Alex Guarnaschelli competes against other Iron Chefs - Michael Symon, Stephanie Izard and Jose Garces.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E5 - Beef Knuckle Down'. The judges are in for some fusion confusion! In the appetiser basket, the chefs get fried potatoes topped with Korean chilli powder.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S32/E13 - MMMMBibimbap'. It's all hands on deck as Tiffany Derry and Jet Tila join forces with chefs Chrissy Camba and Johnny Clark to wipe Bobby Flay off the 'bibimbap.'

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S33/E1 - Under The Tuscan Sun'. Chefs Paolo Calamai and Angelo Competiello, with the help of Kalen Allen and Anne Burrell, show 'Roberto' Flay how Tuscan cuisine is done in the old country.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S33/E2 - Happy Feet'. Scott Conant and Damaris Phillips pull out all the stops, including a dance number, to help contenders Hari Pulapaka and Denis Radovic finish big against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S33/E3 - Bottoms Up, Bobby Down!'. Actress, and comedian Aisha Tyler and Katie Lee Biegel ply Bobby Flay with cocktails while Jeff Potts and Brittney Williams toast their path to victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S33/E4 - This Is How We (Kati) Roll'. The View's Sunny Hostin and Christian Petroni rock Bobby Flay with a Kati roll challenge. Chefs Romain Paumier and Avishar Barua roll up to the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S33/E5 - Turn Down For What?'. Hip-hop icon Lil Jon and Anne Burrell get wild in the kitchen with lights, beats and bottle service. Chefs Eva Pesantez and Robert Butts hope to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S33/E6 - 'Bouillabaisse-ic' Instinct'. Chefs Dan Jackson and Camila Rinaldi are aided and abetted by Sunny Anderson and Jet Tila as they try to slay Bobby Flay. Will they prevail?

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S33/E7 - Make It Work'. Fashion icon Tim Gunn and Carla Hall send chefs Rocco Carulli and Craig Richards down the culinary runway to dress Bobby Flay down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S33/E8 - Kitchen Crime Scene'. Law & Order's Angie Harmon and Scott Conant aren't making it easy on Bobby Flay as they aid and abet chefs Crystal Wahpepah and Adrien Blech.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S22/E2 - Fun Family Favorites'. The team serves up quick dishes the whole family will love. Recipes include pizza stuffed chicken and takeout-style sesame cauliflower.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E6 - Uni Versed?'. The chefs put their sea urchin knowledge to the test in the appetiser round. Then, a corn cake meets a classic candy in the dessert basket.

programme.title: Haunted Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Monster Mash'. Three chefs create a party for the ghoulish stars of Halloween. The judges decide which gingerbread artist goes to the finale for a shot at the $25,000 grand prize.

programme.title: Haunted Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Ultimate Haunted House'. Three showdown winners return to compete in the frightful finale. Who will make the ultimate haunted house out of gingerbread and win the $25,000 prize?

programme.title: Haunted Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Calling All Ghostbusters'. Three gingerbread artists vie for a spot in the finale as they create pieces that celebrate the 35th anniversary of the movie Ghostbusters.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E11 - From Noodle To Strudel'. Guy Fieri hits up some major deliciousness with sweet strudel in Boulder, Colorado, next-level Nepalese in Alberta and killer noodles in Memphis, Tennessee.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E12 - Hearty Handfuls'. Guy Fieri digs into hearty handfuls of major flavour, like next-level pizza in Tennessee, tasty tacos in Alberta, and elevated empanadas in Georgia.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E13 - Great Taste, Surprising Place'. Guy Fieri grabs big flavour in unexpected spots, like south-of-the-border classics in Calgary, masterpieces in a museum and pub grub in an airport.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E14 - Soup, Sandwiches And Seafood'. Guy Fieri dives into amped-up eats, from Nashville hot chicken at a coastal Georgia joint and savoury Vietnamese street food in a Calgary noodle bar.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E15 - Flavor World'. Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine starting in Phoenix, Arizona. Then, he tries authentic Argentine in Boulder, Colorado, and Ethiopian meats in Memphis, Tennessee.

programme.title: Next Baking Master: Paris
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Like A Fine Wine And Cheese'. The final four shop for a dessert spotlighting cheese. Next, after a lesson from a sommelier, the competitors create desserts featuring alcohol.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - Do-nut Ride This Carousel'. The bakers make bloody filled doughnuts to commemorate an unfortunate accident and mix joy with doom on the creepiest carousel ever.

programme.title: Armando's Asian Twist
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Super Saver Student Special'. After arriving on campus and seeing an empty fridge, Armando prepares a budget-friendly birthday feast for students at a local college.

programme.title: Armando's Asian Twist
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Aboriginal Awesomeness'. Armando spends time with Taiwan's Amis tribe, who show how they raise water buffalo. Next, he uses daylilies to put a twist on a classic risotto dish.

programme.title: From The Source
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Grapes'. Katie visits a unique farm founded by an enthusiast in North Carolina to explore the wonders of the juicy and pulpy muscadine grape.

programme.title: From The Source
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Vinegar'. Katie discovers the plethora of raw ingredients that can be transformed into tart and tasty vinegar during a trip to Brooklyn, New York.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S4/E13 - It's Simply The Zest'. Michael Symon prepares fluke Milanese and keeps things fresh with a shaved courgette salad. Liz tops it all off with a lemon drop martini.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - Pork Roastin' And Toastin''. Michael Symon prepares smoked pork butt for pulled pork sandwiches along with crispy fried courgette chips with parmesan.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E2 - Good Vs. Evil'. The teams conjure up displays inspired by the classic film, The Exorcist. Next, they must showcase the ultimate battle between good vs evil.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S57/E13 - Crustacean Craze'. The chefs crush open crustaceans in every round to make sensational seafood meals. Plus, will a risky plan in the dessert round will work out?

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Hawaiian Vacation'. Guy Fieri's hankering for Hawaii with an array of delicious dishes. There's kalua pig, tempura broccolini, saimin and pineapple fried rice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S5/E9 - Smothered And Sauced'. Guy Fieri gets saucy with a smothered sloppy joe in Orlando, drenched fries in Philadelphia and sauced-up gnocchi in East Providence.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S5/E10 - Eats Of The Northeast'. Guy Fieri samples Northeastern takes on nationwide flavours, from Californian hot dogs in Connecticut to serious strombolis in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - A Stick To Your Ribs Stakeout'. Four chefs make stick-to-your-ribs plates before they lighten things up with detox dishes. The two final competitors deliver decadent desserts.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S13/E1 - Big Midwestern Tractor Lunch'. Molly Yeh makes a big Midwestern lunch for her favourite farmer! The menu includes bacon and ranch grain bowls and monkey bread with creamy veggie dip.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S13/E2 - Fantabulous Kids Brunch'. Molly Yeh makes a cool kids' brunch for the whole family! She serves breakfast sausage stuffed biscuits, spinach egg bites, and frozen peanut butter drinks.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S34/E11 - Sweet Summer'. Ree Drummond cools down on hot summer days with a decadent ice cream, party-ready treats, classic dipped cones and boozy frozen prosecco grapes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S34/E12 - Treats For Todd'. Ree Drummond has a care package for her son Todd that's loaded with berry tarts, chocolatey oatmeal bars, cheesy snack mix and colourful pretzels.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E2 - Good Vs. Evil'. The teams conjure up displays inspired by the classic film, The Exorcist. Next, they must showcase the ultimate battle between good vs evil.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S4/E13 - It's Simply The Zest'. Michael Symon prepares fluke Milanese and keeps things fresh with a shaved courgette salad. Liz tops it all off with a lemon drop martini.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Greener Pastures'. To fill their freezer, Atz Lee and Jane chase the first salmon run of the season, while Otto and Eivin fix the homestead's defences to contain their cattle herd.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: 'S8/E5'. People from all over America try to revamp old cars, but sometimes they can't finish the job. Now, mechanics are here to help and get the bangers back on the road.

programme.title: Mega Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Mile High Skyscraper'. Shanghai faces a double crisis: overpopulation and urban sprawl. Could the solution be building up and constructing the planet's tallest tower, over 1.5km high?

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - The Doc Amendment'. After a difficult end to last season's list racing, the 405 agree to a list shakeup - everyone loses his spot on the list and has to race to earn a new place.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - No More Stalling'. Ryan and Chief finally line up to race off for #1. With the list complete, the 405 gets ready for their first list race of the season.

programme.title: America: Facts Vs Fiction
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - D.C. Decoding'. Few realize that the remains of the original White House are buried under a baseball diamond in Virginia - or that people have jumped over the Washington Monument.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S9/E11 - Scalpels/Oil Paint/British Police Helmets/Ice Axes'. How do they make scalpels, oil paints, British police helmets, and ice axes? Find out, as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Hell In High Water'. Rafting through frigid mountain rapids tests the competitors' ability to work together. A brutal injury could take one of them out of the challenge.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Drop Zone'. To cross a 90-foot vertical gorge, the survivalists must work together to build a rope bridge. One warrior has to overcome a debilitating fear to complete the challenge.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S9/E13 - Automatic Transmissions/Miniature Silverware/Hot Air Balloons/Darts'. How do they make hot air balloons, miniature silverware, transmissions, and darts? Find out, as more items are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Déjà Vu'. The drivers rush to make repairs as the top racers scramble to get ready to race. Meanwhile, Farmtruck and AZN head out of town to compete in a Daily Driver event.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Top Dom'. The racers of the 405 struggle to get their cars ready after a tough few weeks of list racing. Meanwhile, Farmtruck and AZN head out of town for an Enduro Race.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Pull Your Weight'. Racing against the clock, the survivalists must carry a 125-pound captive through brutal terrain including sheer drops, mountain gorges, and frigid waterfalls.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Darkest Hour'. Captured, bound, and blindfolded in the dark of night, the warriors must escape the frigid Canadian wilderness before sunrise. Plus, one survivalist goes rogue.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Don't Lose Your Head'. The guys are in Borneo, looking for a fish close to extinction - the mahseer. To find it, they risk entering the territory of the headhunting Dayak people.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Tacos & Tarpon'. In Mexico, the crew navigate a maze of crocodile and mosquito-infested waterways and lagoons in search of a rumoured paradise for fishing tarpon.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Trash Can Rocketeers'. Kevin and Grant take on the role of rocket scientists and attempt to design the ultimate Trash Can Rocket using the lens of an old projection TV.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Concrete Canoe Challenge'. Kevin and Grant turn science into speed and turbocharge a Rocket Skateboard. Using a batch of homemade supersonic rocket fuel, what could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Rebel With A Cause'. Derek travels to the last standing AMC dealership in Pikeville, North Carolina. He finds an AMC Rebel SST convertible that needs reviving.

programme.title: Asphalt Cowboys
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Forever!'. The big day has finally arrived: trucker Mike and his girlfriend Bianca are getting married. Meanwhile, Thorsten has to deal with a broken down truck.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Mint Condition'. The Fairlane build is painted, assembled and upholstered. But, getting it fired and working properly has the whole team scratching their heads.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - On The Road Again'. Dave and Kevin take the show on the road to Loveland, where they hope to capture a major award for the Copper Caddy and Mischief, a 1952 Pontiac.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - It Sounds Bitchin', Let's Make It Look Bitchin''. A 69 Camaro has a new owner who wants to finish off the build. Plus, a 1965 Mustang with mechanical issues gets a Bitchin upgrade.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - The Supernova'. 16 years in the making, Kindig It Design finally finishes the '67 Nova. With a fairly standard exterior, will its over 2,000HP be powerful enough for the client?

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - The One Where Nick Gets Arrested'. The guys go to Pleasanton, CA, for a big West Coast car show. But first, they must get a Chevelle road-ready - if the staff aren't arrested.

programme.title: Shifting Gears With Aaron Kaufman
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Model A-K'. Aaron plans to take a Model A Dragster and his Harley WLA to The Race of Gentlemen, a vintage beach drag race with a bunch of other hot rod enthusiasts.

programme.title: Overhaulin'
programme.desc: 'S8/E6 - Scott's 1963 Cadillac El Dorado'. As a member of the LAPD Scott is always looking out for his community. However he hasn't been able to give his '63 Cadillac the same attention.

programme.title: Dual Survival
programme.desc: 'S5/E26 - Saturation Point'. Bill and Grady head to remote, rocky coastal Maine where they go through a bog, face a nor'easter storm and journey towards the coast.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: Into The Unknown
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Zambia'. British explorer Ed Stafford heads to the plains of Zambia, as he searches for unexplained markings seen from space. With an armed guard, the threats are widespread and real.

programme.title: Bad Dog
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Monkey Business'. Monkey Boo has free reign of the house and his owner's heart and Duke, a Labradoodle, is obsessed with getting into anything that might contain food.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Waste Not, Want Not'. Otto, Charlotte, Eivin & Eve harvest a cow to stock up on meat for winter. At the head of the bay, Atz Senior's range riding skills are tested.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Secrets Of The Range Rider'. The end of summer leaves little time to complete winter preparations. To heat the cabin, the family must transform raw metal pipes into a working chimney.

programme.title: Dragons: Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - The Longest Day'. With his teammates grounded due to lack of sleep from the midnight sun, Hiccup tries to help a hurt dragon alone, but suddenly gets in over his head.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Captain Underpants and the Dreadful Debacle of DJ Drowsy Drawers'. A school dance sounds like fun - but only if the boys can keep their music teacher from playing DJ and putting everyone to sleep.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Captain Underpants and the Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra'. To get out of an epic assignment, George and Harold go back in time to the moment homework was invented to try and stop it before it starts.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Into the Belly of the Den of the House of the Nest of the Cats'. Mom tries to help Tim get over his fear of the neighborhood crazy-cat-lady

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Spirit Day'. Mega Fat CEO Baby holds a game day at Baby Corp and Boss Baby must find a way to beat Mega Fat CEO Baby at his own game

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Bernie The Parrot'. Pat needs to deliver Bernie the parrot to Amy for a check-up, before getting Bernie back to the Parrot Sanctuary. But Bernie escapes, and gets into a lot of mischief!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Red Rocket'. Pat delivers Ted's Red Rocket for the a Flying Machine Challenge, but when the Rocket lifts off with Pat and Jess inside, Pat must fly the rocket and win the trophy.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - A Disco Machine'. Pat has to deliver a disco machine to school in time for the disco, but the machine is damaged in an accident and Pat has to get it repaired.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - A Giant Cake'. Pat's special delivery is a big cake...with PC Selby hiding inside it! Pat has to deal with a herd of cows and a runaway cake to get the cake to Lucy's surprise party.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The City
programme.desc: 'S3/E63 - Book Club/The Lost Dust Bunny'. Bob gets a surprise when he tries to exclude Larry from his book club. While Archie hunts for a lost dust bunny, Larry and Bob baby-sit his 99 others.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The City
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - The Water Slide, Story Time'. The Veggie pals help Larry conquer his fear of the new water slide. After Gary tells a whopper, teacher Bob shares stories about the folly of lying.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - The Case Of The Snow Mystery'. t's Christmas Day and Noddy's got a new snowglobe. He wishes it would snow outside but Big Ears tells him that it has never snowed in Toyland.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - The Case Of The Wonky Toys'. All the toys in Toyland are visiting Fuse's workshop for a toy check but something is wrong! Toys are fine before the check and wonky after!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - The Case Of The Tug Of War Rope'. It's the annual Tug-of-War game in Daredale between the Pirates and the Ninjas. As the game starts the tug-of-war rope snaps.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - The Case Of The Runaway Animals'. All the farm animals have run away from the farm and are causing chaos in Toy Green. Noddy launches his investigation and discovers that the farm gate was left open.

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - Mad About Madagascar'. The Wanderers travel to Madagascar, but Odlulu is already using the Bouncy-Bounce Key. They must catch Woof before Madagascar is turned into a bouncy house.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Dome Sweet Dome / My Pet Clamsquatch'. Chet accidentally trades all of the town's tomatoes to the devious Ace Gecko // Skidmark has been secretly keeping a clamsquatch as a pet.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Itty Bitty Blossom'. The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom that goes from newborn to full-grown in one day.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Dollhouse Store Day'. When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse!

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business

programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Lucky And The No-Good Outlaw Butch Lepray'. DreamWorks the 24-hour channel dedicated to kids and family entertainment.

programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Eye'll Be Watching You, Sorry Not Sorry'. Convinced Troll Village is dangerous Branch makes a security plantPoppy creates an apology monster out of Gristle when teaching him how to make amends.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Big Poppy, Neighbour War'. When a troll starts to ruin the fun of open mic night Poppy is forced to enter a compliment battle.Branch tries to drive Sky Toronto away when he moves next door.

programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Achoo!'. Harry knows he's the luckiest kid in the world, his Nana has given him the best present ever. A bucket with six toy dinosaurs that come to life and are all his best friends.

programme.title: Harry And His Bucket Full Of Dinosaurs
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Super Harry'. At home, Harry is pretending to be a Super Hero, but his efforts to help his family only cause more problems.

programme.title: Super Rugby

programme.title: Die Boodskap

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E76 of 260'. At veg desperaat om iemand aan die lewe te hou. Tracy konfronteer vir Daleen, en Karen ontferm haar oor 'n pasient wat nie sy eie naam kan onthou nie.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E77 of 260'. Tertius praat openlik en eerlik met sy dogter. Karen ontvang goeie nuus oor die John Doe wat opgeneem is, en Bets is skielik nie meer so desperaat om vir Conrad te sien nie.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E78 of 260'. Louis en Naomi baklei oor Bets. Tracy moet afskeid neem, en Karen besef haar pasiënt begin onthou. Jacques waarsku At dat Conrad se lewe bedreig word, en At sweer wraak.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E79 of 260'. Conrad se situasie gee vir 'n sekere leuenaar so 'n bietjie grasie. 'n Verhouding wat op 'n krisispunt was, lyk of dit gaan oorleef. Karen is desperaat oor haar noodgedwonge leuen.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E80 of 260'. 'n Brief help Tracy om 'n besluit te neem wat Tertius onkant vang. Conrad se situasie gee twee vroue hoop dat alles nie verlore is nie.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E120 of 174'. Riaan het sy hande vol met Imelda, terwyl Kaashifa vrae vra wat mense verkeerd opvryf. Kate en Justin beland in die sop, en Zoe probeer die regte ding doen ten spyte van haarself.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E121 of 174'. Lee-Ann vind uit daar is 'n probleem met Imelda se projek. Die geluk is aan Justin se kant, terwyl Kaashifa tot 'n skokbesef kom.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E122 of 174'. Huweliksklokkies lui in Ruiterbosch, terwyl Nazeem tot Bennie se redding kom. Imelda probeer die regte ding doen.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E123 of 174'. Imelda maak oop teenoor Bridgette en onthul 'n paar goed oor haarself. Riaan moet dringend Kwaggabaai toe gaan, terwyl Gary iets skokkend teenoor Angie onthul.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E124 of 174'. Kaashifa en Mymoena pleit by Bridgette om Imelda vir ete te nooi. Justin kry 'n baie onfikse Siya onder hande. Dinge ruk handuit op Kwaggabaai, terwyl die vonke weer spat tussen Angie en Zoe.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E45 of 88'. Lily maak oop teenoor JP. Fabian is onseker of hy die dwelms moet verkoop. Shakiel deel goeie nuus met Brandon en Sylvia. Patty is verheug oor Lily se nuus.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E46 of 88'. Brandon is seergemaak dat sy pa niks met hom te doen wil hê nie. Beeno maak 'n skokkende voorstel aan Gloria. En is Jasmine besig om swakker te word?

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E47 of 88'. Ronnie is bekommerd oor Jasmine ná 'n klein ongeluk. Sonja gee vir Christine meer inligting oor Everlasting. Manny gee vir Kevin goeie nuus. Beeno dreig Gloria, maar gaan sy ingee?

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 of 88'. Beeno begin 'n plan beraam om van Kevin ontslae te raak. Jasmine sukkel al hoe meer met haar hand. Die Cloetes trek eindelik in hul nuwe huis in.

programme.title: Gee My Krag
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 of 13'. Abraham en Tertius het die stad verlaat om in die Knysna woud hul 'n besonderse benadering tot terapie te beoefen. Hul woon op die Pachamama Forest Retreat wat die inheemse bos hervestig.

programme.title: Taktiek
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 of 13'. Karen help vir Arend om Lisa terug te wen en sweep vir Attie, Mignon en Venter in haar plan in. Goose klop by Willy Brown en Bronwyn aan vir afspraak advies.

programme.title: Die Groot Dag
programme.desc: Twee rugbymal swaers se grootste nagmerrie word waar - hulle vrouens se sussie trou op dieselfde dag as die Rugby Wêreldbeker eindstryd en hulle moet ten alle koste die troue mis!

programme.title: Afgrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 of 10'. Julia ontdek dat Riana iets vir haar en Basson geheim hou. Basson se gedrag teenoor Nadine het lelike gevolge vir haar.

programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - 1/11'. Vedanth and Amulya, two individuals with contrasting personalities, constantly argue with each other.

programme.title: This Is Fate
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - 7/2'. Rajveer and Sristhi rush an unconscious Preeta to the hospital. Rajveer is a bit puzzled when Srishti accidentally blurts out that Rajveer really cares for his mother, Preeta.

programme.title: Force Of Attraction
programme.desc: 'S1/E123 - 1/123'. Shiv, a doctor, is emotionally distant due to the events that occurred in his past. His path crosses with Shakti, an orphan who is good at nurturing the broken ones.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: 'S1/E123 - 1/123'. Dua's blissful marriage takes a sudden turn when her husband unexpectedly asks for her approval to marry another woman, disrupting the harmony of her once perfect life.

programme.title: My Heart Knows
programme.desc: 'S4/E55'. Sarthak tells Avani that she need not fulfil her duties as his wife. Avani makes Moksh do petty jobs at home.

programme.title: Ringside Rebel
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - 1/3'. Phulki is late for work because she chooses to walk to the store, rather than taking an expensive ride. Rohit is angry and he refuses to let her into the store.

programme.title: Amaqhawe: Our Heros
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - 1/2'. In a world where remarkable achievements often go unnoticed, Amaqhawe shines a light on those who have defied the odds to make meaningful impacts socially.

programme.title: Amulya's Wedding
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - 1/12'. Vedanth and Amulya, two individuals with contrasting personalities, constantly argue with each other. However, they soon fall for each other and try to make their relationship work.

programme.title: This Is Fate
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - 7/3'. Srishti is worried when she realises Rajveer intends to teach the Luthra's a lesson for wronging Preeta. Srishti tries to convince Rajveer not to do anything stupid and to stay away from the Luthra family.

programme.title: Un...Fortunate Love
programme.desc: 'S4/E142'. Lakshmi and Rishi struggle to defend their love against the relentless interference of Malishka, who will stop at nothing to claim Rishi for herself.

programme.title: Hearts Crossed
programme.desc: 'S1/E84 - 1/84'. In a serendipitous meeting, Gouri, an ardent worshipper of Goddess Kali, crosses paths with Ishan, a doctor who holds strong atheist beliefs.

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: 'S1/E261 - 1/261'. Special crime branch officer Jagaddhatri attempts to balance her personal and work life, but keeping her real identity a secret whilst running an NGO.

programme.title: My Journey To You
programme.desc: 'S1/E84 - 1/84'. Amruta, a romantic who values the connection of love and marriage, crosses paths with Virat, who carries the wounds of a failed relationship.

programme.title: Force Of Attraction
programme.desc: 'S1/E124 - 1/124'. Shiv, a doctor, is emotionally distant due to the events that occurred in his past. His path crosses with Shakti, an orphan who is good at nurturing the broken ones.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: 'S1/E124 - 1/124'. Dua's blissful marriage takes a sudden turn when her husband unexpectedly asks for her approval to marry another woman, disrupting the harmony of her once perfect life.

programme.title: Ringside Rebel
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - 1/3'. Phulki is late for work because she chooses to walk to the store, rather than taking an expensive ride. Rohit is angry and he refuses to let her into the store.

programme.title: Love Unbound
programme.desc: Kind-hearted Heer faces difficulties when her rich family marries her into the Atwal family, but she finds the confidence to overcome all obstacles through the support of her childhood friend Ranjeet.

programme.title: Aparajita
programme.desc: 'S1/E65'. Akshay tells the police officers that he is an intelligence officer and threatens to call the home minister to complain against them if they do not release the girls.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: Secrets and mystery drive this crime thriller based on a bestselling novel. A woman who raised herself in the marshes of the Deep South becomes a suspect in the murder of her ex.

programme.title: The Whale
programme.desc: Brendan Fraser's performance in this moving psychological drama earned him an Oscar. A reclusive, morbidly obese English teacher tries to restore his relationship with his daughter.

programme.title: Joika
programme.desc: A gripping film inspired by a remarkable true story. An American ballet dancer who dreams of becoming a great ballerina is accepted into Moscow's elite Bolshoi Ballet Academy.

programme.title: Praise This
programme.desc: A feel-good, modern faith-based musical comedy. An aspiring superstar is forced to join her cousin's underdog praise team in the lead-up to a national championship competition.

programme.title: Little Loopers
programme.desc: A golfer with an attitude meets his match with a group of teens in this family sports movie. A former golfer sentenced to community service must teach teenagers to play.

programme.title: Mavka: The Forest Song
programme.desc: A captivating and magical animated film inspired by Ukrainian folklore. Mavka faces an impossible choice between love and her duty as guardian of the Heart of the Forest.

programme.title: Journey To Bethlehem
programme.desc: This live-action Christmas musical adventure for the entire family weaves classic Christmas melodies with humour, faith, and new pop songs in a retelling of the birth of Jesus.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Megan Fox and Will Arnett star in this action-packed reboot of the 90s kids classic. When the city of New York is threatened, it's up to four mutated turtles to protect it.

programme.title: Migration
programme.desc: A fun, exciting animation from the creators of Minions, Sing, and Despicable Me. Take flight into the thrill of the unknown with a family of ducks on a once-in-a-lifetime vacation.

programme.title: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Wrestler-turned-actor John Cena stars in this funny family comedy. When an elite firefighter team rescues three siblings, they face a task that they are not ready for: babysitting.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury Of The Gods
programme.desc: Zachary Levi returns as Shazam in this hilarious sequel. While Billy and his foster siblings learn how to juggle their superhero lives, they face a vengeful trio of ancient gods.

programme.title: Poolman
programme.desc: Chris Pine directs and leads this star-studded quirky comedy. A Los Angeles pool cleaner is recruited by a femme fatale to help uncover corruption in a shady business deal.

programme.title: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: The saying, 'two's company, three's a crowd', rings true in this funny comedy. A romantic honeymoon for a newlywed couple goes horribly wrong when the groom's best friend gatecrashes it.

programme.title: Nikki Glaser: Good Clean Filth
programme.desc: In a manner that is brutally honest yet conversational, watch comedian Nikki Glaser explore a range of topics often considered 'taboo' in her first HBO comedy special.

programme.title: Blacklight
programme.desc: This action thriller finds Liam Neeson and Aidan Quinn on opposite sides of the law. A freelance government operative finds himself in the crosshairs of a man he once helped protect.

programme.title: Fatman
programme.desc: Mel Gibson plays a gun-toting Santa Claus in this action film. A broke and down-on-his-luck Santa tries to save his dying business while fighting a ruthless killer for his life.

programme.title: The Infernal Machine
programme.desc: Guy Pearce propels this slow-burning mystery thriller. A reclusive writer is drawn out of hiding when he receives anonymous letters from an obsessive fan.

programme.title: Justice League: Warworld
programme.desc: An action-packed fantasy animation. Transported to a place of unending brutal gladiatorial combat, Batman, Superman and Wonder Woman must form a resistance and lead the planet to freedom.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: Men In Black fans will love this supernatural action movie. Ryan Reynolds and Jeff Bridges are part of a secret police department charged with fighting the undead.

programme.title: Alpha Code
programme.desc: A sci-fi mystery thriller. A man teams up with a woman on the run and a former UN agent to find his half-alien daughter.

programme.title: Midnight In The Switchgrass
programme.desc: Bruce Willis and Megan Fox face a deadly criminal in this action thriller. An FBI agent and Florida State officer team up to investigate a string of unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: The Minute You Wake Up Dead
programme.desc: This thriller is full of twists and turns. After a shady small-town stockbroker begins dating a shy waitress, a shocking murder takes place, and one of them may be responsible.

programme.title: Survive The Night
programme.desc: Action star Bruce Willis drives this home invasion thriller. Two robbers hold a disgraced doctor and his family hostage so that they can get treatment after a robbery gone wrong.
Adam Driver fights for survival in this action-packed sci-fi thriller. After a catastrophic crash on a mysterious, unknown planet, an astronaut quickly discovers he's not alone.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Andrew Garfield returns for a second round of web-slinging action. Dangerous new enemies and family secrets weigh heavy on young Peter Parker as he struggles with his destiny.

programme.title: Last Seen Alive
programme.desc: Gerard Butler shows there are no limitations when trying to find the truth. After a man's estranged wife disappears, he takes the law into his own hands while evading the authorities.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves returns as the lethal assassin in this non-stop action thriller. John Wick comes out of retirement to help an old associate, pitting him against deadly killers.

programme.title: Knock At The Cabin
programme.desc: A suspense-filled apocalyptic thriller by M. Night Shyamalan. A holidaying couple and their daughter are taken hostage by four strangers who demand an unthinkable sacrifice.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: Vengeance is golden in this action film set during the last days of WWII. When an ex-soldier discovers gold in the wilderness, he must defend his loot and himself from Nazi soldiers.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S105/E7 - Healthy Life in Ambergris Caye'. A couple who recently dealt with a health scare move to Ambergris Caye in Belize for a stress-free life. But, can they agree on the same property?

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Atlantis In America'. New theories claim the sunken city of Atlantis may have been in the Americas. From the Bahamas to an ancient site in Louisiana, Rob and Stefan seek the evidence.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Mystery Of The Ice Cave'. A strange cave freezes in summer and melts in winter, and a huge sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob and Stefan explore these mysteries.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Alien High Tech'. A startling new report claims a prominent astrophysicist worked on an aircraft reverse-engineered from the parts of downed UFOs. Ben Hansen investigates.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Aliens Underground'. The small town of Dulce, New Mexico, may harbour an underground alien base. Ben Hansen travels there to investigate if the rumours are true.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - They Walk Among Us'. Hunters unearth new clues about Bigfoot's cosmic origins. An Air Force veteran receives a shocking response when he reports UFO activity over Fairbanks.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Captured'. A couple finds massive footprints near Nancy Lake. Is something nonhuman stalking them? Strange lights circle above Fairbanks in coordinated patterns, shocking witnesses.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Tesla's Final Secrets'. Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention. But the ground beneath his only remaining lab may hold clues.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Doomsday Volcano Mystery'. Beneath the densely populated city of Naples lies a looming threat. A super volcano may be on the verge of erupting and cause an apocalyptic catastrophe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Viking Secrets'. Josh Gates investigates how a group of Norse tribesmen gained power in medieval Europe. His quest for answers takes him from Denmark to Iceland.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Vikings In America'. Josh Gates traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Yeti'. Experts investigate shocking new DNA evidence that links one of the world's most elusive figures, the Yeti, resides in America and comes from an otherworldly source.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Beast Of Bray Road'. Experts analyse new evidence that could prove the Beast of Bray Road is terrorised a Wisconsin town. Plus, is the human-wolf hybrid spreading across the US?

programme.title: Expedition Mungo
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Living Dinosaur Of Liberia'. A huge crocodilian known as the Gbahali is killing people in Liberia. Mungo wonders if it is a species more akin to a dinosaur than others alive today?

programme.title: Expedition Mungo
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Namibia's Dog-Headed Pig Monster'. Mungo travels to Namibia to investigate the Dog-Headed Pig Monster, a beast that prowls the night, preying on livestock and village children.

programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Atlantis In America'. New theories claim the sunken city of Atlantis may have been in the Americas. From the Bahamas to an ancient site in Louisiana, Rob and Stefan seek the evidence.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
